name: replayfx-journal
description: TradingView Backtest Journal and Webhook Analytics

scripts.postinstall: npm run install:server && npm run install:client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "server,client" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:clean: fuser -k 5000/tcp 2>/dev/null || true; fuser -k 3000/tcp 2>/dev/null || true; npm run dev
